Package org.graalvm.buildtools.maven

package org.graalvm.buildtools.maven
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.graalvm.buildtools.maven.config
     
    org.graalvm.buildtools.maven.sbom
     
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AbstractNativeImageMojo
    Base mojo for Maven native-image workflows, including executable lookup and schema validation.
    AbstractNativeMojo
     
    AbstractResourceConfigMojo
     
    AddReachabilityMetadataMojo
    Adds dependency reachability metadata from the configured metadata repository to the project's output directory.
    DeprecatedNativeBuildMojo
    Deprecated.
    ListLibrariesMissingMetadataMojo
    Lists direct runtime dependencies that do not have reachability metadata in the configured metadata repository.
    MergeAgentFilesMojo
    Merges tracing agent output from one or more sessions into a single metadata directory.
    MetadataCopyMojo
    Copies and optionally merges tracing agent metadata into META-INF/native-image for packaging.
    NativeBuildDynamicAccessMetadataMojo
    Generates dynamic access metadata used by the native image Build Report.
    NativeBuildResourceConfigMojo
    Scans main resources and generates resource metadata for them.
    NativeBuildTestResourceConfigMojo
    Scans test resources and generates resource metadata for them.
    NativeCompileMojo
    Builds a native executable by forking Maven to the package phase before invoking native-image.
    NativeCompileNoForkMojo
    Builds a native executable in the current Maven lifecycle without forking a separate Maven build.
    NativeExtension
    This extension is responsible for configuring the Surefire plugin to enable the JUnit Platform test listener and registering the native dependency transparently.
    NativeTestMojo
    Builds and runs the project's tests as native executables.
    RuntimeMetadata
     
    WriteArgsFileMojo
    Writes the native-image arguments for this project to an args file that can be reused outside Maven.
